allow: PowerShell($p = Start-Process npm -ArgumentList "run","dev" -PassThru -NoNewWindow -RedirectStandardOutput "$env:TEMP\\km_dev.log" -RedirectStandardError "$env:TEMP\\km_dev.err"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 7; $url = "http://localhost:5173/"; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; if \($r.Content -match 'id="root"'\) { "root div presente OK" } } catch { "ERROR: $_" }; "--- dev log \(errores\) ---"; if \(Test-Path "$env:TEMP\\km_dev.err"\) { Get-Content "$env:TEMP\\km_dev.err" -Tail 15 }; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
